results.title: Trump Demands Rehearing in Birthright Citizenship Case
results.description: President Trump wants another shot at a Supreme Court loss that legal experts say is almost certainly final. The president said Wednesday he'll seek a rehearing after the high court last week invalidated his order limiting automatic US citizenship for children born on American soil. Trump's directive had required at...

results.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark 1.1 to Challenge OpenAI and Anthropic in AI Coding Tools Race
results.description: Meta launched Muse Spark 1.1 on Thursday, an agentic AI model for coding priced at $1.25 per million input tokens to compete directly with Anthropic and OpenAI. Mark Zuckerberg posted on X for the first time in three years to announce the launch.

results.title: Physicists created a tiny universe where time emerged without a clock - ScienceDaily
results.description: Physicists created a tiny universe where time emerged without a clock ScienceDaily Physicist creates 'mini-universe' in lab and proves time is an illusion WION 'Time was speeding up, slowing down, or even stopping': Physicist demonstrates a key theory of time by building a 'mini-universe' in his lab Live Science
